name: refactoring-ui-skills
description: AI-powered UI design skills based on Refactoring UI principles. Evaluate and improve interface designs with expert-validated guidance.

interface.shortDescription: AI-powered UI design skills for evaluating and improving interfaces
interface.longDescription: A collection of 10 atomic UI design skills extracted from Refactoring UI by Adam Wathan & Steve Schoger. Each skill has been validated to 97% agreement with the book's principles. Skills cover visual hierarchy, typography, color, spacing, button design, visual clutter, empty states, shadows, contrast, and element grouping.
